title: Update Services section layout to match reference format

requirements.summary: Redesign Services section to display tarot reading service cards in a clean, card-based layout matching the reference images with circular icons, serif fonts, prices, and 'per session' labels
acceptanceCriteria: Services are displayed in a vertical stack or responsive grid of cards
Each card shows the service icon/badge, title, description, price, and 'per session' text
Typography uses elegant serif fonts (Cinzel or Cormorant Garamond) for titles
Cards have rounded borders and consistent spacing between elements
Layout matches the visual hierarchy shown in the uploaded reference screenshots

file_operations.description: Redesign the Services component to display each tarot service in individual card format with rounded borders, ample padding, and subtle borders. Each card must display: a circular icon/badge (Mini Readings badge from reference), service title using Cinzel or Cormorant Garamond serif font, brief description below title, price prominently displayed (₹199, ₹299, etc.), and 'per session' label beneath the price. Implement responsive grid or vertical stack layout. Remove the existing pentacle SVG decoration and replace with the card-based layout. Fetch services using the existing getTarotServiceCatalog query from useQueries hook. Style cards with rounded corners (rounded-2xl), consistent padding, and maintain the mystical theme colors from the global CSS variables.

requirements.summary: Group services by category with section headers displaying 'Mini Readings', 'Premium / In-Depth Readings' and other categories with matching typography from reference images
acceptanceCriteria: Services are organized under clear category headers (e.g., 'Mini Readings', 'Premium / In-Depth Readings')
Category headers use matching typography and styling from the reference
Each category section is visually separated with appropriate spacing

file_operations.description: Add category section headers above each service group. Display 'Mini Readings' header with the circular Mini Readings badge/icon from the reference screenshots, followed by the mini reading service cards. Add similar section headers for 'Premium / In-Depth Readings' (matching premiumExclusive category), 'Love & Relationship' (loveRelationship category), 'Career, Money & Life' (careerMoneyLife category), and 'Deep & Detailed Readings' (deepDetailed category). Style section headers with serif fonts matching the reference images. Use the catalog structure returned by getTarotServiceCatalog (miniReadings, premiumExclusive, loveRelationship, careerMoneyLife, deepDetailed arrays) to organize services by category. Add appropriate vertical spacing between category sections to create clear visual separation.
